results.title: Elvan: Turn customer feedback into decisions with AI | Product Hunt
results.content:
Feedback collection can be triggered directly from tools like Zendesk and Salesforce when key events happen, such as ticket resolution or deal closure.

Responses stream into Slack in real time, so your team sees customer feedback as it happens and can act immediately.

Instead of reading 200 responses, you get a few clear actions to focus on.

## 👥 Who is this for?

 SaaS founders and product teams
 Customer Success and CX leaders
 Product-led growth teams
 Indie hackers

Especially teams that already collect feedback but struggle to act on it.

## 🔧 Use Cases

 NPS after onboarding
 CSAT after support interactions
 In-product feedback after feature usage
 PMF surveys
 Post-purchase feedback for eCommerce

## 🎁 Launch Offer [...] Free Options

### We built Elvan to turn customer feedback into decisions with AI — ask us anything! 🎉

Hey Product Hunt!

We're incredibly excited to launch Elvan today an AI-native feedback platform built to help product teams stop guessing and start deciding.

📌

Hey Product Hunt 👋

I’m Ravi, co-founder of Elvan.

We built Elvan on @Vercel with a simple goal. Make customer feedback as actionable as product analytics. [...] Elvan turns feedback into a real-time signal layer.

 Capture feedback at the right moment based on real user events
 Collect across channels like product, email, and your existing tools
 Automatically analyze responses with AI
 Route insights to where your team already works

You go from raw responses to clear, structured insight your team can act on immediately..

## ⚡ Why Elvan is Different

We did not start with surveys and add AI later.

We built Elvan from scratch to focus on one thing. Turning feedback into action.

 No complex builders
 No manual tagging
 No enterprise bloat

## 🧠 Features & Benefits

Elvan automatically:

 Detects sentiment
 Clusters recurring themes
 Surfaces early churn signals
 Identifies feature requests
 Generates summaries you can share with leadership

results.title: CoPilot.Live Reviews (2026) | Product Hunt
results.content:
4.9

Based on 13 reviews

Review CoPilot.Live?

Reviewers mostly praise CoPilot.Live for feeling more practical than a generic chatbot. The strongest theme is its focus on commerce-specific actions, with users saying it connects actions to context and behaves more like a knowledgeable team member than a simple answer engine. Others highlight easy setup for building and deploying a chatbot, plus a general productivity boost. Feedback is overwhelmingly positive and light on criticism, though one review asks for future support around seasonal trend prediction and customer behavior analysis.

4.2

Based on 5 reviews

Review ClientZen?

ClientZen is praised for its ability to streamline feedback analysis and provide actionable insights with minimal effort. Users appreciate its capability to gather input from multiple channels and define custom topics for improved monitoring and prioritization. The product is noted for its ease of use and powerful features, making it a valuable tool for product managers and teams focused on customer-centric development. However, one user reported technical issues with excessive requests to Zendesk, highlighting the need for reliable support and system integration.

results.title: B2Metric: Make better decisions and predict users' next actions. | Product Hunt
results.content:
4.9

Based on 7 reviews

Review B2Metric?

B2Metric is highly praised for its user-friendly interface and comprehensive analytics capabilities, enabling businesses to make data-driven decisions with ease. Users appreciate its ability to predict customer behavior and segment audiences effectively, which enhances marketing strategies. The platform's integration capabilities and single-dashboard design are highlighted as key strengths, allowing seamless data analysis across various systems. Feedback from users emphasizes the tool's efficiency in delivering valuable insights quickly, making it a vital asset for marketing teams aiming to optimize growth and customer engagement.

Saves tonnes of time and effort. Love the agentic search, bug reporting and ability to create a ticket on Jira or Clickup directly from the search report, makes life so much easier for our Product and Ops teams!

#### What's great

time saver (3)Jira integration (1)bug reporting (1)agentic search (1)Clickup integration (1)

Report

 2 views

•1 review [...] •1 review

At my startup, a consumer mobile app, we were one of the first (I think?) people to start using Anecdote. It has an amazing ability to aggregate all the messages you receive from your users or customers (app store reviews, emails, zen desk, social media) and convert that feedback from qualitative into quantitative. Give gives you incredible results like top 10 things people love/hate, top features, areas of focus. Before Anecdote, we used to export all that data and hire someone to classify the feedback to turn it into actionable steps. That's now all done automatically. Like everyone else, we've been captivated by the power of AI and Anecdote is the perfect example of AI being used to help businesses better understand what their customers want and need.

#### What's great
